data.content: Plan recorded for `foolery-920b`: align queue-row cells by moving the beats table to middle-aligned data cells and normalizing the custom queue pills/buttons to the same visual height as the existing badge components. Expected implementation touch points are `src/components/ui/table.tsx`, `src/components/beat-column-defs.tsx`, `src/components/beat-column-defs-extra.tsx`, plus a small beat-table layout regression test and manual Queues-view verification with and without the repo column.
